calendar.matters:
Request For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment filed 07/19/2022.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:29:16 a.m, pausing at 10:43:00 a.m., reconvening at 10:47:03 a.m., and concluding at 10:50:08 a.m.

Urbano Ezquerro, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Valencia Street, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company.
No appearance by Defendant Stanley Nickle, D.B.A., Tromborg Royal Plumbing.

Counel for Plaintiff proceeds with an offer of proof.
Court finds Plaintiff's Declaration filed 07/19/2022 to be true and correct.

Plaintiff Valencia Street, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit A: Written Lease
Exhibit B: 3 Day Notice served 06/07/2022

Plaintiff's Exhibit A and B are ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE based on the offer of proof presented by Plaintiff.
The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Valencia Street, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company, and against Defendant Stanley Nickle, D.B.A., Tromborg Royal Plumbing.

Plaintiff Valencia Street, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company is awarded judgment against Defendant Stanley Nickle, D.B.A., Tromborg Royal Plumbing as follows:

Past-due rent: $32,670.00
Holdover damages: $13,223.45
Costs: $435.00
Interest: $1,470.90

Total Judgment: $47,799.35

Additionally, Plaintiff Valencia Street, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company is entitled to possession of the property located at 4769A Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94112, County of San Francisco.
The Lease is FORFEITED.

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Request For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Continued To Sep-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
